allow: Bash(xargs grep:*)
Bash(grep -r "waitlist\\|registration\\|invitation\\|invited\\|accepted\\|declined" /c/cmput301/Potato-Planner/Code/EventPlanner/app/src/main/java/com/example/eventplanner/*.java)
Bash(grep -E "\\.java$")
Bash(./gradlew compileDebugJavaWithJavac)
Bash(sed -i 's/^public class EventList extends CustomLogs {/\\/** Displays a list of events using a custom log-based layout. *\\/\\npublic class EventList extends CustomLogs {/' EventList.java)
Bash(sed -i 's/^public class History extends CustomLogs{/\\/** Displays historical log entries using a custom log-based layout. *\\/\\npublic class History extends CustomLogs{/' History.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class Admin extends User {/\\/** Represents an admin user with elevated privileges for managing events, users, and content. *\\/\\npublic class Admin extends User {/' Admin.java)
Bash(sed -i 's/^public class Notification {/\\/** Model representing a notification sent to a user about an event action. *\\/\\npublic class Notification {/' Notification.java)
Bash(sed -i 's/^public class Organizer extends User {/\\/** Represents an organizer who can create and manage events. *\\/\\npublic class Organizer extends User {/' Organizer.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class WaitlistActivity extends AppCompatActivity {/\\/** Activity displaying the waitlist for a specific event with real-time updates. *\\/\\npublic class WaitlistActivity extends AppCompatActivity {/' WaitlistActivity.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class WaitlistAdapter extends RecyclerView.Adapter<WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder> {/\\/** RecyclerView adapter for displaying entrant names and emails in a waitlist. *\\/\\npublic class WaitlistAdapter extends RecyclerView.Adapter<WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder> {/' WaitlistAdapter.java)
Bash(sed -i 's/^public class EntrantLocation{/\\/** Model storing an entrant'\\''s geographic coordinates for geolocation-required events. *\\/\\npublic class EntrantLocation{/' EntrantLocation.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class EventTypeFragment extends DialogFragment {/\\/** Dialog fragment that lets the user choose between creating a public or private event. *\\/\\npublic class EventTypeFragment extends DialogFragment {/' EventTypeFragment.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {/\\/** Entry point of the app. Checks if the user has a profile and routes to setup or home. *\\/\\npublic class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {/' MainActivity.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class AdminNotificationAdapter/\\/** RecyclerView adapter for displaying notification log entries in the admin view. *\\/\\npublic class AdminNotificationAdapter/' AdminNotificationAdapter.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class AdminNotificationLogsActivity/\\/** Admin screen that displays all notification logs across the system. *\\/\\npublic class AdminNotificationLogsActivity/' AdminNotificationLogsActivity.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class BrowseEventsActivity/\\/** Activity for browsing and filtering events with search, sort, and tag filtering. *\\/\\npublic class BrowseEventsActivity/' BrowseEventsActivity.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class FragmentPrivateEventSetup/\\/** Setup dialog for creating a private event with registration dates, capacity, and tags. *\\/\\npublic class FragmentPrivateEventSetup/' FragmentPrivateEventSetup.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class FragmentPublicEventSetup/\\/** Setup dialog for creating a public event with registration dates, capacity, and tags. *\\/\\npublic class FragmentPublicEventSetup/' FragmentPublicEventSetup.java)
Bash(sed -i 's/^public class MapViewActivity/\\/** Activity displaying a Google Map with entrant location pins for an event. *\\/\\npublic class MapViewActivity/' MapViewActivity.java)
Bash(sed -i 's/^public class HomePage/\\/** Main home screen with navigation bar and upcoming event notifications. *\\/\\npublic class HomePage/' HomePage.java)
Bash(sed -i 's/^public class EventAdapter/\\/** RecyclerView adapter for event cards, routing to organizer or entrant views based on role. *\\/\\npublic class EventAdapter/' EventAdapter.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class EventWaitlistActivity/\\/** Activity showing the waitlist for an event with join and leave functionality. *\\/\\npublic class EventWaitlistActivity/' EventWaitlistActivity.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/^public class FragmentFinalEntrantList/\\/** Dialog showing the event waitlist with navigation to pending, selected, and cancelled entrant views. *\\/\\npublic class FragmentFinalEntrantList/' FragmentFinalEntrantList.java)
